title: Awaken the Giant Within
author: Anthony Robbins
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A sleeping figure (curled up, hairline outline). Above the figure, a giant red footprint — the 'giant within' emerging. The footprint is a red shoe-print outline. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Sleeping figure: a curved body shape -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round">
      <!-- Head -->
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-200" r="44"/>
      <!-- Body (curved) -->
      <path d="M -310 -160 Q -180 -100 -100 0 Q -50 60 -100 140 Q -180 200 -340 220 Q -400 240 -420 280"/>
      <!-- Arms tucked -->
      <path d="M -300 -100 Q -260 -50 -240 -10"/>
      <!-- Knees -->
      <path d="M -100 140 Q -60 200 -120 240"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A pillow under the head -->
    <rect x="-420" y="-180" width="160" height="50" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Z Z Z sleep marks above the figure (small) -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#4c4c4c" font-weight="300" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="-280" y="-280">z</text>
      <text x="-240" y="-320">z</text>
      <text x="-200" y="-360">Z</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The GIANT red footprint above -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none">
      <!-- Sole -->
      <ellipse cx="200" cy="-100" rx="80" ry="180" transform="rotate(-15 200 -100)"/>
      <!-- 5 toes (small circles) -->
      <circle cx="120" cy="-260" r="20" transform="rotate(-15 120 -260)"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="-300" r="22" transform="rotate(-15 160 -300)"/>
      <circle cx="210" cy="-320" r="24" transform="rotate(-15 210 -320)"/>
      <circle cx="260" cy="-310" r="20" transform="rotate(-15 260 -310)"/>
      <circle cx="295" cy="-280" r="18" transform="rotate(-15 295 -280)"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A vertical red line connecting the sleeping figure to the giant footprint -->
    <line x1="-100" y1="-160" x2="100" y2="-160" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">WAKE UP · STEP UP</text>
</svg>
rationale: A small hairline sleeping figure (curled, head on a pillow, Z's drifting up) on the left. Above and to the right, a giant red 3px footprint — heel, sole, five toes — that's the 'giant within.' A faint red dashed line connects them. The composition is a sleeper and the giant who wakes them. Title 280px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
